title: Pnputil.exe
html:
Pnputil.exe

Used for installing drivers

Execute

Add malicious driver

pnputil.exe -i -a {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.inf}

Used for installing drivers — MITRE: T1547 — Privileges: Administrator
